The question is asking to determine which year was Davis Love's best earning year. To find out, we need to sort the data based on the "earnings ($)" column in the order of "large to small" using the f_sort_column(earnings ($)) operation. This will allow us to see the earnings from highest to lowest, and thus identify the year with the highest earnings as the best earning year.
The highest earnings in the table occur in the year 2003, with earnings of $6,081,896. Therefore, Davis Love's best earning year was 2003.
